reviewReply.comment:
Hi,
We hear you, and feedback like this helps us raise the bar. Your feedback has been shared with our kitchen team and we’re reviewing it closely as we continue refining both our menu and overall experience.

We’d love the opportunity to welcome you back and show you the improvements for yourself. Feel free to DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.
